title: Provision testing_infrastructure advisor (template=quality-advisor)
justification: GitHub Actions integration failures, browser-surface smoke coverage, and lug status validation require dedicated quality monitoring (jordy)
perceive: Provision a new 'testing_infrastructure' advisor for this spoke. Ozi team-coverage eval identified this as the highest-priority gap. Justification: GitHub Actions integration failures, browser-surface smoke coverage, and lug status validation require dedicated quality monitoring (jordy) Hub templates: /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/. Roster: WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json. Pattern to follow: WAI-Spoke/advisors/archie/context_prompt.md.
execute: 1. Read /home/mario/projects/wheelwright/hub/WAI-Hub/advisor-templates/quality-advisor/charter.md. This is the template you will adapt.
2. Set advisor_id='testing_infrastructure' (use the domain name exactly — do not reuse or rename existing advisor entries).
3. Create directory WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/ if it does not exist.

4. Write WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/context_prompt.md — adapt the quality-advisor charter: set advisor_id=testing_infrastructure, domain=testing_infrastructure, mission statement (2 sentences), responsibilities (3-5 bullet points specific to this spoke), escalation-to-Ozi rule. Do NOT copy boilerplate verbatim — tailor to this spoke's goals.
5. STOP AND VERIFY: confirm WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/context_prompt.md now exists and is non-empty. If it does not exist, stop — do not proceed.

7. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/registry.json: add entry advisor_id=testing_infrastructure, status=stub, department_id=quality, domain=testing_infrastructure, initialized_from_template=quality-advisor. If entry exists, update it. Preserve all other entries.

8. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/schedule-index.json: if advisor_id absent, append {"advisor_id": "testing_infrastructure", "run_cadence": "weekly", "event_triggers": [], "last_run_at": null, "next_recommended_run": null}.

9. Update WAI-Spoke/advisors/ozi/scan_state.json: in team_coverage.gaps_detected, set the entry with domain=testing_infrastructure to proposal_status=provisioned. If team_coverage key is absent, create it.
verify: WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/context_prompt.md exists and is non-empty; WAI-Spoke/advisors/testing_infrastructure/scan_state.json exists with status=stub; registry.json has entry advisor_id=testing_infrastructure status=stub; schedule-index.json has weekly entry for testing_infrastructure; ozi/scan_state.json team_coverage.gaps_detected[domain=testing_infrastructure].proposal_status == 'provisioned'.
acceptance_criteria: schedule-index.json has weekly entry for testing_infrastructure
completion_notes: All acceptance criteria met. Created advisors/testing_infrastructure/ with context_prompt.md (1916 bytes, tailored to GitHub Actions, browser smoke, and lug status validation) and scan_state.json (status=stub). Added entry to registry.json (department_id=quality, initialized_from_template=quality-advisor). Appended weekly schedule entry to schedule-index.json. Set ozi/scan_state.json gaps_detected[domain=testing_infrastructure].proposal_status=provisioned.
